interfaces.name: searchUnitsNearby
interfaces.description: Search for available storage units near a ZIP, city, or address with filters and sorting for the Unit Search Results page.

parameters.name: searchTerm
parameters.description: User-entered search term such as ZIP code, city, or address (e.g., '94110', 'Austin, TX').

unitSizeLabels.description: Filter by specific unit size labels such as '5x10', '10x10'.

onlyAvailable.description: If true, only return units where is_available is true.

promotionTypes.description: Limit to units with one of the given promotion types.

maxMonthlyRate.description: Maximum monthly rate filter (e.g., 80 to find units under $80/month).

maxDistanceMiles.description: Maximum distance from searchTerm in miles if distance is available.

interfaces.name: getUnitSearchFilterOptions
interfaces.description: Get available filter options for the Unit Search Results page (size categories, features, promotions).

features.description: Feature checkboxes for filtering (drive-up access, climate control, etc.).

promotion_types.description: Promotion filter options such as first month free.

interfaces.name: searchLocationsNearby
interfaces.description: Search for storage locations (facilities) near a ZIP, city, or address with filters and sorting for the Location Search Results page.

parameters.name: searchTerm
parameters.description: User-entered search term such as ZIP code or 'Seattle, WA'.

parameters.name: maxDistanceMiles
parameters.description: Maximum distance from the search term in miles (e.g., 10 for 'within 10 miles').

unitSizeId.description: If present, limit to locations that offer at least one available unit of this size.

estimated_starting_price.description: Optional estimate of lowest available unit price at this location.

has_requested_unit_size.description: True if filters.unitSizeId was provided and this location has such units.

interfaces.name: getLocationSearchFilterOptions
interfaces.description: Get filter and distance options for the Location Search Results page.

distance_options_miles.description: Common distance presets for the distance slider or dropdown.

feature_flags.description: Boolean filter options for location features.

interfaces.name: getLocationDetails
interfaces.description: Get facility details for a specific location for the Location Detail & Units page.

parameters.name: locationId
parameters.description: ID of the location whose details should be displayed. Typically derived from the page URL.

interfaces.name: getLocationUnits
interfaces.description: Get the list of units for a specific location with filters and sorting for the Location Detail & Units page.

parameters.name: locationId
parameters.description: Location whose units should be listed.

onlySizesAtLeast.description: Filter for units with size at least this label (e.g., '10x10' to get 10x10 and larger).

interfaces.name: getLocationUnitFilterOptions
interfaces.description: Get filter options for the units list on a specific location detail page (size options, features, promotions).

parameters.name: locationId
parameters.description: Location for which to compute available unit filter options.

unit_size_labels.description: Specific size labels that have at least one available unit.

features.description: Feature filter options for this location's units.

promotion_types.description: Promotion options that exist for at least one unit at this location.

interfaces.name: setPreferredLocation
interfaces.description: Set the current location as the single preferred storage facility for the agent.

parameters.name: locationId
parameters.description: Location to mark as preferred.

interfaces.name: getPreferredLocation
interfaces.description: Get the currently preferred storage facility location, if any, for use in headers and on the Location Detail page.

interfaces.name: getTourAvailability
interfaces.description: Get available tour slots for a given location, date, and visit type for the scheduling widget on the Location Detail page.

parameters.name: locationId
parameters.description: Location for which to fetch tour availability.

parameters.name: date
parameters.description: Calendar date in ISO format YYYY-MM-DD (e.g., '2026-05-10').

interfaces.name: bookTourAppointment
interfaces.description: Book a tour appointment for a specific tour slot from the scheduling widget.

parameters.name: tourSlotId
parameters.description: Selected tour slot to book.

interfaces.name: startReservationForUnit
interfaces.description: Start a reservation checkout flow for the selected unit from any unit card (Unit Search Results or Location Detail page). Creates a pending reservation if one does not already exist.

parameters.name: unitId
parameters.description: Unit selected via the Reserve/Select button.

next_step.description: Recommended next step in checkout flow, e.g., 'select_move_in_date'.

interfaces.name: getReservationSummary
interfaces.description: Get the current reservation summary including unit details, selected move-in date, contact info, payment option, and insurance selection.

parameters.name: reservationId
parameters.description: Reservation to load for the Reservation & Checkout page.

interfaces.name: updateReservationDetails
interfaces.description: Update move-in date, contact information, and payment option for a reservation prior to final confirmation.

parameters.name: moveInDate
parameters.description: Selected move-in date in ISO format YYYY-MM-DD (e.g., '2026-04-15').

interfaces.name: getAvailableInsurancePlansForReservation
interfaces.description: Get the list of active insurance/protection plans available to select during reservation checkout.

parameters.name: reservationId
parameters.description: Reservation context for which to load applicable insurance plans.

recommended_coverage_amount.description: Optional recommendation based on unit size or known contents value.

interfaces.name: selectReservationInsurancePlan
interfaces.description: Select a specific insurance/protection plan for a reservation during the add-ons step.

interfaces.name: finalizeReservation
interfaces.description: Complete the reservation and generate a confirmation number after all steps (move-in date, contact info, payment option, insurance) are set.

interfaces.name: getSizeGuideOverview
interfaces.description: Get an overview of standard unit sizes with descriptions and typical contents for the Size Guide page.

interfaces.name: getSizeGuideOptions
interfaces.description: Get property type options and item checklist entries for the interactive Size Guide calculator.

item_checklist.description: List of items user can select to describe what they are storing.

example_for_task.description: True for items like queen_mattress, sofa, dining_table, boxes_medium_5, tv_stand.

interfaces.name: calculateRecommendedUnitSize
interfaces.description: Calculate a recommended storage unit size based on property type and selected items in the Size Guide calculator.

parameters.name: selectedItemKeys
parameters.description: Array of item keys selected by the user, e.g., ['queen_mattress', 'sofa', 'dining_table', 'boxes_medium_5', 'tv_stand'].

surrounding_sizes.description: Other sizes around the recommended one (including next larger and smaller) for comparison.

interfaces.name: searchLocationsForUnitSize
interfaces.description: Search for locations near a given ZIP/city that offer at least one available unit of the specified size, used after selecting a size from the Size Guide.

parameters.name: searchTerm
parameters.description: ZIP code or city used on the location selection screen (e.g., '30309').

parameters.name: unitSizeId
parameters.description: The unit size selected from the Size Guide to filter locations by.

interfaces.name: getSuppliesCategoriesWithHighlights
interfaces.description: Get moving supplies categories and highlight popular bundles or starter kits for the Moving Supplies landing page.

highlight_products.description: Popular products in this category to feature on the landing page.

interfaces.name: getSuppliesCategoryDetails
interfaces.description: Get details for a moving supplies category to display as the header on the category page.

parameters.name: categoryId
parameters.description: Category whose products are being displayed.

interfaces.name: getSuppliesProducts
interfaces.description: Get products for a specific supplies category with optional filtering and sorting for the category listing page.

parameters.name: categoryId
parameters.description: Supplies category to list products for.

maxPrice.description: Maximum price filter (e.g., <= 25 for a medium box bundle under $25).

interfaces.name: getSuppliesProductDetails
interfaces.description: Get full details for a moving supplies product for the Product Detail page.

interfaces.name: addSuppliesProductToCart
interfaces.description: Add a moving supplies product to the single-user cart (creates a new cart if none exists).

interfaces.name: getCartSummary
interfaces.description: Get a lightweight summary of the cart for quick access in the site header or Moving Supplies landing page.

interfaces.name: getCartDetails
interfaces.description: Get full cart details including line items and subtotal for the Shopping Cart page.

interfaces.name: updateCartItemQuantity
interfaces.description: Update the quantity of a specific cart line item from the Shopping Cart page.

parameters.name: quantity
parameters.description: New quantity for this cart item. If set to 0, the item may be removed.

interfaces.name: removeCartItem
interfaces.description: Remove a specific item from the cart from the Shopping Cart page.

interfaces.name: getHelpCategoriesOverview
interfaces.description: Get Help & FAQ categories and featured articles for the Help & FAQ landing page.

interfaces.name: searchHelpArticles
interfaces.description: Search help and FAQ articles by keyword and optional category.

parameters.name: query
parameters.description: Search keywords entered by the user (e.g., 'vehicle storage access hours').

interfaces.name: getHelpArticleDetails
interfaces.description: Get the full content of a specific help or FAQ article for the Help Article Detail page.

interfaces.name: submitContactMessage
interfaces.description: Submit a contact form inquiry from the Contact Us page and return confirmation.

parameters.name: relatedLocationName
parameters.description: Free-text reference to a location, e.g., 'Dallas, TX Main Street'.

interfaces.name: getAboutAndPoliciesContent
interfaces.description: Get About & Policies content for the informational page, including summaries of key policies.

interfaces.name: getHomepagePromotions
interfaces.description: Get dynamic promotions or featured locations/units to highlight on the homepage Promotions section.

featured_unit_promotions.description: Optional list of highlighted unit-level promotions such as first month free.

interfaces.name: getPreferredLocationSummary
interfaces.description: Get a concise preferred location summary suitable for displaying in the site header or homepage.

helperFunctions.name: _getOrCreateCart
helperFunctions.description: Internal helper to load the single-user Cart from storage or create a new one if none exists.

helperFunctions.name: _recalculateCartTotals
helperFunctions.description: Internal helper to recompute cart subtotal after cart item changes.

helperFunctions.name: _createPendingReservation
helperFunctions.description: Internal helper to create a new pending Reservation and link it to the selected Unit and Location.

helperFunctions.name: _getReservationById
helperFunctions.description: Internal helper to load a Reservation and related Unit and Location data.

helperFunctions.name: _filterAndSortUnits
helperFunctions.description: Internal helper to apply filter and sort logic for unit search and location units listings.

helperFunctions.name: _filterAndSortLocations
helperFunctions.description: Internal helper to apply distance, rating, and price_estimate sorting for location searches.

helperFunctions.name: _getOrCreatePreferredLocation
helperFunctions.description: Internal helper to manage the PreferredLocation record for the single-user agent.

helperFunctions.name: _calculateRecommendedSizeFromRules
helperFunctions.description: Internal helper to evaluate SizeGuideRule entries and return a recommended UnitSize for the Size Guide calculator.

helperFunctions.name: _findNextLargerUnitSizes
helperFunctions.description: Internal helper to use UnitSize.sort_order to find the next larger and smaller sizes around a given UnitSize.

helperFunctions.name: _getTourSlotsForLocationAndDate
helperFunctions.description: Internal helper to list TourSlot entries for a location and date and mark which are already booked.

helperFunctions.name: _bookTourSlot
helperFunctions.description: Internal helper to mark a TourSlot as booked and create a TourAppointment.

helperFunctions.name: _getAvailableInsurancePlans
helperFunctions.description: Internal helper to load active InsurancePlan records and optionally tailor them based on reservation attributes.

helperFunctions.name: _generateReservationConfirmationNumber
helperFunctions.description: Internal helper to generate a unique confirmation number when finalizing a reservation.
